must_have_quals: Experience in developing for multiple operating system environments including both Windows and Unix, Experience with a variety of user interface implementation approaches, Demonstrable competence in XML, XSL, SOAP, Web Services, eCommerce, HTML, JavaScript, Demonstrate competence in designing modern web applications based on REST and Angular, Experience with Object Oriented design and development, Familiarity with InterSystems IRIS, Caché, or Ensemble, Have contributed substantially to the deployment of an application-rich intranet or extranet
preferred_quals: Bachelor's degree or foreign equivalent in a technical field or STEM, 3+ years of experience in a full stack development role, Process improvement and/or program and project management background is a plus, preferably in a software or other technology company
core_responsibilities: Work with internal users and capture needs for creating new applications as well as extending and enhancing current applications, Create and deploy new functionality and applications for use by InterSystems staff and their customers by exploiting the full power of the company’s products, Document the code and generate appropriate user documentation, Work closely with product developers to apply newly introduced InterSystems IRIS features to new and existing applications, Provide continuous feedback to the product development group regarding the new features in the product, Provide technical customer support and consultation service related to product installation and application, Assist in integrating company’s various applications, Assume additional responsibilities as requested, Manage projects; initiate and drive multiple workflows to successful completion with strong communication and collaboration, Support Integrations with legacy systems and other internal Applications
job_summary: InterSystems is a creative data technology provider that delivers a unified foundation for next-generation applications across various industries. The Applications Developer will design and develop applications for internal staff and customers, working closely with users to capture needs and enhance current applications.
